title: 10 Herbal Teas For Frizzy Hair
description: Calendula officinalis teas contains triterpenoids, sesquiterpenes, and flavonoids. These compounds help to protect and condition the hair, reducing frizz and flyaways. The sesquiterpenes in calendula officinalis teas have anti-inflammatory properties, which soothe the scalp and reduce irritation that can lead to frizzy hair.
